attributes.background: Make a lockdown for menigitus, there is more and more people getting menigitus and dying because of it. I feel like, the reason covid spread was because of when we went into lockdown late. So if you make a lockdown now then the country will be safer as it won't spread as much.

rejection.details:
We are unclear about the action sought, and suggest that events may have surpassed the action called for in this petition.

You could submit a new petition calling for changes to the Government's general approach to imposing lockdowns in such cases in the future, if you would like to.
